message.content: {"problems":[{"number":5,"points":3,"problem_type":"multiple_choice","question":"함수 $f(x) = (x+2)(2x^2 - x - 2)$ 에 대하여 $f'(1)$ 의 값은?","choices":["6","7","8","9","10"]},{"number":6,"points":3,"problem_type":"multiple_choice","question":"$1$보다 큰 두 실수 $a, b$가 $$\\log_{a} b > -\\infty,\\quad |\\log_{3} \\frac{b}{4}| < 2$$ 을 만족시킬 때, $\\log_{a} b$의 값은?","choices":["1","3","4","5","8"]},{"number":7,"points":3,"problem_type":"multiple_choice","question":"두 곡선 $y = x + 3$, $y = -\\frac{2}{x-3}$과 직선 $x = 2$로 둘러싸인 부분의 넓이는?","choices":["\\frac{18}{5}","\\frac{7}{2}","\\frac{17}{5}","\\frac{33}{10}","\\frac{16}{5}"]}]}
